title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・連星の宴

text_block_list.name: Ayabe and Opera O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Exhale... Ahhh! Yes, that was incredible!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Encore! Encore! Our performance must continue!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Taking down veterans and newcomers alike! This
quartet is top of the line!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Do whatever you want. Just leave me out of it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes. I will indeed do what I want.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your voice is piercing, yet it overlaps with our
own...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And certainly, together, it will travel, resonating
unfiltered, into the ears of those eager to hear of
our exploits.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Whatever you say.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Then, Ayabe, you understand where our
next performance will be held, no?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A stage where only the strongest Umamusume in
the world gather. The—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I told you. I don't care about your theatrics.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Err, Ayabe left...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Yes, Doto. But her leaving was not a
rejection.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It was a sign that she already knows.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Next... can we do the Japan Cup?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's a part of the Senior Autumn Triple Crown. I
think I'm fit for the distance too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
And... I'm not suggesting this because of what just
happened.
choice_data_list: Hm? ...All right, let's go for the Japan Cup!
Hm? ...All right, let's go for the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm ready to train when you are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we set our sights on the Japan Cup, which
will be held in a month.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll have to do a lot of intensive training in a
short period of time. I want her to run with the
same excitement she had today, if not more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's time to redouble my efforts as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... Ergh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: They're so fast. And so strong...
